creator: mcdade@plus8.com
text:
When using the 3com etherlink III rev.A card there is problems with the drive and it is not detected properly.  The card was found as device ie1 interface and did not function properly.

Fix: 

Install the same card but the REV. B version.  There is markings on the 3com card wiether it is a 3c509 or a 3c509b.  Notice in documentation should but changed to assure users don't try and use the rev. a  version.
How-To-Repeat: 
      Install card to unit.   Card does work fine in win95 box.
